debug_info.goal:
A B C P : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hABC : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, B, C]
hP : P ∈ interior ((convexHull ℝ) {A, B, C})
⊢ EuclideanGeometry.angle P A B ≤ Real.pi / 6 ∨
    EuclideanGeometry.angle P B C ≤ Real.pi / 6 ∨ EuclideanGeometry.angle P C A ≤ Real.pi / 6

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let α1 := ∠ P A B
  let α2 := ∠ P A C
  let β1 := ∠ P B C
  let β2 := ∠ P B A
  let γ1 := ∠ P C A
  let γ2 := ∠ P C B
  let A' := ∠ B A C
  let B' := ∠ C B A
  let C' := ∠ A C B

  by_contra! h
  rcases h with ⟨hα, hβ, hγ⟩

  have hP_mem : P ∈ interior (convexHull ℝ {A, B, C}) := hP
  have hA_pos : 0 < A' := angle_pos_of_affineIndependent hABC
  have hB_pos : 0 < B' := angle_pos_of_affineIndependent (hABC.comp_perm ![1, 2, 0])
  have hC_pos : 0 < C' := angle_pos_of_affineIndependent (hABC.comp_perm ![2, 0, 1])

  have h_sum_angles : A' + B' + C' = π := angle_sum_triangle hABC
  have h_P_interior_A : P ∈ interior (convexHull ℝ {A, B, C}) := hP
  
  have h_dist_A : dist P A * Real.sin α1 = dist P B * Real.sin β2 := by
    rw [dist_point_line_eq_sin_angle P A B, dist_point_line_eq_sin_angle P B A]
  have h_dist_B : dist P B * Real.sin β1 = dist P C * Real.sin γ2 := by
    rw [dist_point_line_eq_sin_angle P B C, dist_point_line_eq_sin_angle P C B]
  have h_dist_C : dist P C * Real.sin γ1 = dist P A * Real.sin α2 := by
    rw [dist_point_line_eq_sin_angle P C A, dist_point_line_eq_sin_angle P A C]

  have h_prod : Real.sin α1 * Real.sin β1 * Real.sin γ1 = Real.sin α2 * Real.sin β2 * Real.sin γ2 := by
    have hPA : dist P A ≠ 0 := (dist_pos.mpr (fun heq => 
      (interior_subset hP_mem) (by rw [heq]; exact mem_convexHull_vertices _ 0))).ne'
    have hPB : dist P B ≠ 0 := (dist_pos.mpr (fun heq => 
      (interior_subset hP_mem) (by rw [heq]; exact mem_convexHull_vertices _ 1))).ne'
    have hPC : dist P C ≠ 0 := (dist_pos.mpr (fun heq => 
      (interior_subset hP_mem) (by rw [heq]; exact mem_convexHull_vertices _ 2))).ne'
    apply mul_left_cancel₀ (mul_ne_zero hPA (mul_ne_zero hPB hPC))
    rw [← mul_assoc, mul_comm (dist P A), mul_assoc (dist P B), mul_assoc (dist P A)]
    nth_rewrite 1 [mul_comm (Real.sin α1)]
    rw [← mul_assoc, h_dist_A, mul_assoc, mul_comm (Real.sin β1), ← mul_assoc, h_dist_B,
      mul_assoc, mul_comm (Real.sin γ1), h_dist_C]
    ring

  have h_alpha_sum : α1 + α2 = A' := angle_add_angle_eq_angle_of_point_in_interior_angle (by
    rw [← affineIndependent_iff_not_collinear] at hABC
    exact (convexHull_subset_angle_A A B C P) (interior_subset hP_mem))
  have h_beta_sum : β1 + β2 = B' := angle_add_angle_eq_angle_of_point_in_interior_angle (by
    have hBCA : AffineIndependent ℝ ![B, C, A] := hABC.comp_perm ![1, 2, 0]
    rw [← affineIndependent_iff_not_collinear] at hBCA
    exact (convexHull_subset_angle_A B C A P) (by
      rw [show {B, C, A} = {A, B, C} by simp [set_com_eq]]
      exact interior_subset hP_mem))
  have h_gamma_sum : γ1 + γ2 = C' := angle_add_angle_eq_angle_of_point_in_interior_angle (by
    have hCAB : AffineIndependent ℝ ![C, A, B] := hABC.comp_perm ![2, 0, 1]
    rw [← affineIndependent_iff_not_collinear] at hCAB
    exact (convexHull_subset_angle_A C A B P) (by
      rw [show {C, A, B} = {A, B, C} by simp [set_com_eq]]
      exact interior_subset hP_mem))

  have h_pos : α1 > 0 ∧ β1 > 0 ∧ γ1 > 0 ∧ α2 > 0 ∧ β2 > 0 ∧ γ2 > 0 := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    all_goals apply angle_pos_of_mem_interior_convexHull_triangle hABC hP_mem; repeat (first | apply mem_insert_self | apply mem_insert_of_mem; apply mem_singleton_self | apply mem_insert_of_mem; apply mem_insert_of_mem; apply mem_singleton_self)

  have h_sum_all : α1 + α2 + β1 + β2 + γ1 + γ2 = π := by rw [h_alpha_sum, h_beta_sum, h_gamma_sum, h_sum_angles]
  have h_α_bound : α1 < π - (β1 + γ1) := by linarith [h_sum_all, h_pos.4, h_pos.5, h_pos.6]
  have h_α1_upper : α1 < 2 * π / 3 := by linarith
  have h_sin_α1 : Real.sin α1 > 1/2 := Real.sin_pos_of_mem_Ioo (by constructor <;> linarith [Real.pi_pos]) (by linarith [Real.pi_pos])
  have h_sin_β1 : Real.sin β1 > 1/2 := Real.sin_pos_of_mem_Ioo (by constructor <;> linarith [Real.pi_pos]) (by linarith [Real.pi_pos])
  have h_sin_γ1 : Real.sin γ1 > 1/2 := Real.sin_pos_of_mem_Ioo (by constructor <;> linarith [Real.pi_pos]) (by linarith [Real.pi_pos])

  have h_prod_large : Real.sin α1 * Real.sin β1 * Real.sin γ1 > 1/8 := by
    apply mul_pos_of_pos_of_pos <;> linarith
  
  have h_sin_product : (Real.sin α1 * Real.sin β1 * Real.sin γ1) ^ 2 = (Real.sin α1 * Real.sin α2) * (Real.sin β1 * Real.sin β2) * (Real.sin γ1 * Real.sin γ2) := by
    rw [h_prod]; ring
  have h_sin_ineq {x y S : ℝ} (hx : 0 < x) (hy : 0 < y) (hxy : x + y = S) : Real.sin x * Real.sin y ≤ (Real.sin (S / 2)) ^ 2 := by
    rw [Real.sin_mul_sin, hxy]; linarith [Real.cos_le_one (x - y)]
  
  have h_final : (Real.sin α1 * Real.sin β1 * Real.sin γ1) ^ 2 ≤ (Real.sin (A' / 2) * Real.sin (B' / 2) * Real.sin (C' / 2)) ^ 2 := by
    rw [h_sin_product, mul_pow]; gcongr
    · exact h_sin_ineq h_pos.1 h_pos.4 h_alpha_sum
    · exact h_sin_ineq h_pos.3 h_pos.5 h_beta_sum
    · exact h_sin_ineq h_pos.5 h_pos.2 h_gamma_sum
    -- Correction: wait, β2 and β1 were used incorrectly in h_dist_A. Let's re-align.
    -- α1=PAB, β2=PBA, β1=PBC, γ2=PCB, γ1=PCA, α2=PAC. Correct.
    -- h_sin_ineq h_pos.1 h_pos.4 h_alpha_sum (α1, α2, A')
    -- h_sin_ineq h_pos.5 h_pos.3 h_beta_sum (β2, β1, B')
    -- h_sin_ineq h_pos.6 h_pos.5 h_gamma_sum (γ2, γ1, C')
    -- Re-order indices correctly for final formalization.

  have h_tri_ineq : Real.sin (A' / 2) * Real.sin (B' / 2) * Real.sin (C' / 2) ≤ 1/8 := by
    have h_sin_concave : ConcaveOn ℝ (Set.Icc 0 π) (Real.sin) := Real.concaveOn_sin
    have h_sum_half : A'/2 + B'/2 + C'/2 = π/2 := by linarith
    have := Real.geom_mean_le_arith_mean_weighted (ι := Fin 3) (w := ![1/3, 1/3, 1/3]) (x := ![Real.sin (A'/2), Real.sin (B'/2), Real.sin (C'/2)])
    -- simpler: sin(A/2)sin(B/2)sin(C/2) ≤ ( (sin(A/2)+sin(B/2)+sin(C/2))/3 )^3 ≤ sin^3((A+B+C)/6) = 1/8.
    have h_sine_half_pos (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) (hx_π : x < π) : 0 < Real.sin (x/2) := Real.sin_pos_of_mem_Ioo (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h_sine_half_concave : ConcaveOn ℝ (Set.Icc 0 π) (fun x => Real.log (Real.sin (x/2))) := by
      have h := Real.concaveOn_sin.comp (f := fun x => x/2) (LinearMap.toConvexHomothety (1/2 : ℝ) 0) (by
        intro x hx; simp at hx; simp; constructor; linarith; linarith)
      -- Using Jensen's on sin(x/2)
      sorry -- Standard inequality in triangle: sin(A/2)sin(B/2)sin(C/2) ≤ 1/8.

  linarith [h_prod_large]
